title: COURAGEOUS KIDS - 211info
text: URGENT CARE UNIVERSITY DISTRICT COURAGEOUS KIDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a grief support group focused on therapeutic art activities and educational resources. Support groups for parents and caregivers run at the same time as groups for children and youth, allowing families to receive help together. 1200 Hilyard Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Children, youth, and their caregivers who have experienced the loss of a friend, parent, sibling, or loved one Hours: Varies by session Email (458) 205-7474 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 205-7474 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: General Bereavement and Grief Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIORITY CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. URGENT CARE UNIVERSITY DISTRICT
